title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 483.060 - Allowances, how paid
text:
483.060.  Allowances, how paid. — All such allowances made to the clerks of the supreme court and the districts of the Missouri court of appeals shall be paid by the state, and those made to circuit and division clerks by the proper county except as otherwise provided by law.  Allowances for clerks serving municipal divisions of the circuit court shall be paid by the municipality served by the clerk.
(RSMo 1939 § 13292, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11673; 1919 § 2119; 1909 § 2682 
Effective 1-02-79
